hero.eyebrow: Himalayan Sound Bowl Sessions in Amsterdam
hero.title: Find stillness in sound
hero.subtitle: Lie down. Close your eyes. Let the ancient vibrations of Himalayan sound bowls wash through you. No effort needed — just surrender.

experience.badge: What is a sound bowl session?
experience.title: Close your eyes. Let go. Feel.
experience.intro: Imagine: you lie comfortably on a mattress, your eyes are closed, and slowly warm, deep sounds fill the space. The vibrations of Himalayan sound bowls resonate through your body — tension dissolves, thoughts come to rest, and you reach a state of deep relaxation you rarely experience in everyday life.
experience.noExperience: No experience needed. No special clothing. Just come as you are.

arrive.title: Arrival & tea
arrive.description: You are welcomed with a cup of tea in a warm, intimate space. A moment to settle in.

session.title: The session
session.description: Lying on a comfortable mattress, you are enveloped by the sounds of Himalayan sound bowls and magical instruments.

after.title: Aftercare & integration
after.description: Afterwards, there is space to let the experience settle, with soup and a personal conversation.

socialProof.quote: It's everything you didn't know you needed.

howItWorks.title: The sound bowl and its effects
howItWorks.paragraph1: The different frequencies and tones of the sound bowls have a harmonious and purifying effect on our body, down to the cellular level. Because the human body consists of approximately 70% water, the frequencies of the different tones cause changes in our energy. Blockages disappear and energy flows more freely.
howItWorks.paragraph2: During the sound bowl session, I focus on the energy system of our body that is influenced by the 7 chakras, the central nervous system, and breathing. The goal of these sessions is stress reduction, letting go of thoughts, and support in healing processes.

stress.title: Stress Reduction
stress.description: Deep relaxation through vibrations that calm the nervous system

energy.title: Energy Balance
energy.description: Restoring blockages and free energy flow through the chakras

healing.title: Healing Support
healing.description: Support for physical and mental healing processes

about.title: Who is Clayret?
about.paragraph1: Born in the warmth of Colombia, shaped by the ocean air of Aruba, and now rooted in the vibrant energy of Amsterdam — Clayret carries a rich tapestry of cultures and traditions that infuse every session with depth and soul.
about.paragraph2: Drawn by a deep reverence for universal energies and the wisdom of the body, Clayret journeyed to the Himalayan regions of Nepal and Ladakh in Northern India to study the ancient art of sound healing. Over years of dedicated training under traditional masters, she learned to play the bowls not just as instruments, but as channels for transformation — honouring a centuries-old lineage that treats sound as sacred medicine.
about.paragraph3: Each session is a symphony of carefully chosen instruments: ancient Himalayan singing bowls, a powerful gong, delicate chimes, a soothing rainstick, and other enchanting tools — all woven together through Clayret's unique methodology, creating an immersive soundscape that is felt as much as it is heard.
about.paragraph4: Clayret believes that no two sessions should ever be the same. She works intuitively, reading the energy of every person and every room, allowing the bowls to guide her to exactly what is needed in that moment. It is this deeply personal approach that makes every visit a one-of-a-kind experience.

items.question: What exactly is a sound bowl session?
items.answer: You lie comfortably on a mattress while Himalayan sound bowls are played around you. The vibrations resonate through your body and bring you into a state of deep relaxation — similar to deep meditation, but without having to do anything.

items.question: Do I need any experience?
items.answer: Not at all. No experience or preparation is needed. You just need to come and surrender to the sounds. The sound bowls do the work for you.

items.question: What should I bring or wear?
items.answer: Wear comfortable clothing you can lie down in. Everything you need — mattress, blankets, pillows, tea — is prepared for you.

items.question: Is it safe? Are there contraindications?
items.answer: Sound bowl sessions are safe for most people. They are less suitable for pregnancy, heart problems, a pacemaker, high blood pressure, thrombosis, or varicose veins. Not sure? Feel free to reach out.

items.question: What if I fall asleep?
items.answer: That's perfectly fine and happens regularly! It means your body is getting exactly what it needs. The sound bowls work even while you sleep.

items.question: How often should I come?
items.answer: That's entirely up to you. Some guests come monthly as a fixed ritual, others as needed. You'll feel the difference after just one session.

items.question: What makes Clayrety different?
items.answer: It starts with Clayret herself — trained for years in the Himalayan tradition in Nepal, she brings an authenticity and depth that you simply feel. Sessions take place in her intimate garden house in Amsterdam, where every detail is prepared with care. She combines ancient singing bowls with gongs, chimes, rainsticks, and other instruments into a layered soundscape that is uniquely hers. But above all, it's the personal touch: Clayret reads the energy in the room and intuits every session in the moment, making each one truly one of a kind.

items.question: Can this help with anxiety or burnout?
items.answer: Absolutely. The vibrations of the sound bowls directly calm the nervous system, shifting your body from a state of stress into deep rest. Many of our guests come specifically for relief from anxiety, burnout, or chronic stress — and consistently report feeling lighter, calmer, and more grounded afterwards. While sound healing is not a substitute for medical treatment, it is a powerful complement to your wellbeing.

items.question: What if I'm skeptical?
items.answer: You are very welcome. No belief system or spiritual background is required. The vibrations of the singing bowls work on a purely physical level — the sound waves resonate through your body, slow your heart rate, and calm your nervous system. Whether you see it as energy healing or simply as deep acoustic relaxation, the effect is the same. Come with an open mind and let the experience speak for itself.
